name: Brook Trout with Ginger Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Peeled and deveined shrimp, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine shrimp, cream, grated ginger, shallots, Tabasco, and salt and freshly ground white pepper. Blend until smooth and thick, about 30 to 40 seconds.
2. Open the brook trout and divide stuffing into four equal portions. Spread mixture evenly on one fillet of the open trout. Fold the other fillet over to enclose the stuffing.
3. Place milk in a shallow dish and mix flour with salt and pepper in another flat dish. Dip each trout in milk, remove excess, then dredge in flour mixture, patting to ensure adherence.
4. Heat oil in a non-stick skillet large enough to hold the trout without crowding. Add trout and brown thoroughly on one side. Flip trout using spatula and brown on other side (about 4 minutes per side depending on thickness). While browning second side, baste with hot oil from pan to prevent drying. Transfer to warm platter.
5. Return skillet to medium heat to melt butter and cook until golden hazelnut color. Add lemon juice and divide butter over trout. Garnish with lemon slices and sprinkle parsley over all. Serve immediately.
